prompt: A static Astro blog with a cyberpunk terminal and tmux-session aesthetic. Generate cinematic but believable scenes with dark charcoal and near-black backgrounds, green phosphor glow, restrained cyan highlights, subtle amber indicator lights, practical monitors, compact home-lab hardware, Linux workstation energy, and real-world desk scale. Favor moody contrast, atmospheric depth, scanline-like light texture, and disciplined composition. Avoid fantasy armor, exaggerated sci-fi cityscapes, excessive magenta, floating holograms, or anything that feels like game splash art. Never include readable text, logos, watermarks, UI overlays, or terminal screenshots with legible words. A calm Linux workstation with architecture notes, cloud and container cues, observability displays, deployment workflow hints, and subtle green phosphor glow. The scene features practical monitors, compact home-lab hardware, and real-world desk scale. A terminal session shows a prompt with a blinking cursor, indicating active use. The background is dark charcoal with atmospheric depth and moody contrast, enhanced by scanline-like light texture. Subtle amber indicator lights add to the realistic feel of a Linux workstation in 2026.
negative_prompt: watermark, logo, signature, blurry, unreadable text, fantasy armor, cluttered collage, neon skyline, floating holograms, oversaturated magenta, duplicated monitors, extra limbs, cartoon style, glossy CGI showroom
